name: hsp
description: Harness Server Protocol: one MCP plugin that selects the right LSP for the workspace

interface.shortDescription: LSP-as-MCP bridge with workspace-aware language server selection
interface.longDescription: Harness Server Protocol exposes language server protocol operations (definition, references, hover, workspace symbols, call hierarchy, diagnostics) as MCP tools. Auto-selects the right LSP per file extension across Python (ty/basedpyright), C# (csharp-ls), and Rust (rust-analyzer) — install one plugin, get semantic code intelligence everywhere.
